title: Velvet Chickpea Casserole
description: A buttery, velvety low-carb-friendly meal-prep dish featuring a can of chickpeas, deglazed in garlic and thyme.
instructions: Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Deglaze the skillet with ¼ cup of water, scraping any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Stir in chopped thyme, salt, pepper, and add chickpeas.
Pour in heavy cream, increase heat to high, bring to a simmer, then reduce by half.
Transfer mixture into oven-safe dish and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes or until heated through.
